privileged_info_summary: The task involves promoting user 'demo_provider' (Dr. James Carter) from group_id 2 (provider) to group_id 1 (admin/Administrator) in the NOSH ChartingSystem, an open-source EHR system. The test data is synthetic: patient data is from Synthea (synthetic patient generator using Massachusetts cohort), the practice 'Hillside Family Medicine' and all user accounts are created by automated setup scripts. The database groups are: ID 1='admin', ID 2='provider'. The admin credentials are admin/Admin1234! and the target user credentials are demo_provider/Provider1234!.
